name: paradox-engine
description: Deterministic Record & Replay for Distributed Systems

scripts.publish:all: npm publish --access public --workspace=packages/paradox-core && npm publish --access public --workspace=packages/paradox-probe && npm publish --access public --workspace=packages/paradox-collector && npm publish --access public --workspace=packages/paradox-replay && npm publish --access public --workspace=packages/paradox-cli && npm publish --access public --workspace=packages/paradox-ui
